hooks.command:
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
cmd = json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\", \"\")
dangerous = [\"rm -rf /\", \"git push --force\", \"DROP TABLE\", \"truncate\", \"format c:\"]
for d in dangerous:
    if d.lower() in cmd.lower():
        print(f\"BLOCKED: 危険なコマンドが検出されました: {d}\")
        sys.exit(2)
"'
